name: Kimball Electronics, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1 - Business General As used herein, the terms Company, Kimball Electronics, we, us, or our refer to Kimball Electronics, Inc., the Registrant, and its subsidiaries. Reference to a year relates to a fiscal year, ended June 30 of the year indicated, rather than a calendar year unless the context indicates otherwise. Additionally, references to the first, second, third, and fourth quarters refer to those respective quarters of the fiscal year indicated. Forward-Looking Statements This ...
